raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"skill","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"I possess a wealth of wisdom in the manipulation of visual elements to produce powerful and evocative animations","distilled_fact":"The speaker possesses a wealth of wisdom in the manipulation of visual elements to produce powerful and evocative animations."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"application","confidence":0.98,"matched_text":"my application into thy most gracious consideration for the position of Senior Motion Designer at Dash","distilled_fact":"The speaker is applying for the position of Senior Motion Designer at Dash."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"skill","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"Through years of study and experimentation, I have honed mine abilities in the mystical arts of Adobe After Effects, Illustrator, Photoshop, and Premiere.","distilled_fact":"The speaker has honed abilities in Adobe After Effects, Illustrator, Photoshop, and Premiere through years of study and experimentation."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"skill","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I am also well-versed in the principles of design","distilled_fact":"The speaker is well-versed in the principles of design."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"intent","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"I am eager to bring mine knowledge to bear in service of thy studio, and to aid in the mentorship and development of thy younger practitioners.","distilled_fact":"The speaker is eager to bring knowledge to bear in service of Dash's studio and to aid in the mentorship and development of Dash's younger practitioners."}]}
